EDA - Klasifikasi Teks Berita Kesehatan Berbahasa Indonesia¶

Model: Convolutional Long Short-Term Memory (C-LSTM)¶

Dataset: Berita kesehatan berlabel diabetes dan tbc

In [51]:
import re
import warnings
from collections import Counter

import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import numpy as np
import pandas as pd
import seaborn as sns
from wordcloud import WordCloud

warnings.filterwarnings('ignore')

plt.rcParams.update({
    "figure.facecolor": "white",
    "axes.facecolor":   "white",
    "axes.spines.top":  False,
    "axes.spines.right":False,
    "font.family":      "DejaVu Sans",
    "axes.titlesize":   13,
    "axes.labelsize":   11,
    "xtick.labelsize":  10,
    "ytick.labelsize":  10,
})

COLOR_DIABETES = "#3266ad"
COLOR_TBC      = "#D85A30"
PALETTE        = [COLOR_DIABETES, COLOR_TBC]

4. Feature Engineering (Statistik Teks)¶

In [55]:
# Pastikan tidak ada NaN sebelum feature engineering
df["content"] = df["content"].fillna("")
df["title"]   = df["title"].fillna("")

df["char_count"]   = df["content"].apply(len)
df["word_count"]   = df["content"].apply(lambda x: len(x.split()))
df["title_words"]  = df["title"].apply(lambda x: len(x.split()))
df["avg_word_len"] = df["content"].apply(
    lambda x: round(np.mean([len(w) for w in x.split()]), 2) if x.split() else 0
)
df["sent_count"]   = df["content"].apply(
    lambda x: len(re.split(r"[.!?]+", x)) if x else 0
)
df["is_duplicate"] = df["content"].duplicated(keep=False)
df["is_missing"]   = df["content"] == ""

df[["keyword","word_count","char_count","avg_word_len","sent_count"]].describe().round(2)

5. Cek Missing Value¶

In [68]:
missing = df['content'].isnull().sum()
empty   = (df['content'] == "").sum()

print("NaN:", missing)
print("Empty string:", empty)

NaN: 0
Empty string: 22

Missing value pada kolom content awalnya ditemukan sebanyak 22 data. Setelah proses menggunakan fillna(), nilai kosong diubah menjadi string kosong sehingga tidak lagi terdeteksi sebagai missing value tetapi dalam bentuk string kosong.

6. Distribusi label¶

In [59]:
counts = df["keyword"].value_counts()

fig, axes = plt.subplots(1, 2, figsize=(11, 4))
fig.suptitle("Distribusi Kelas Label", fontsize=14, fontweight="bold")

# Bar chart
bars = axes[0].bar(counts.index, counts.values, color=PALETTE, width=0.5, edgecolor='white')
axes[0].set_title("Jumlah Artikel per Kelas")
axes[0].set_ylabel("Jumlah Artikel")
for bar, val in zip(bars, counts.values):
    axes[0].text(bar.get_x() + bar.get_width()/2, bar.get_height() + 10,
                 f"{val:,}", ha="center", va="bottom", fontsize=12, fontweight="bold")
axes[0].set_ylim(0, counts.max() * 1.15)

# Pie chart
axes[1].pie(counts.values, labels=counts.index, autopct='%1.1f%%',
            colors=PALETTE, startangle=90, pctdistance=0.75,
            wedgeprops={'edgecolor': 'white', 'linewidth': 2})
axes[1].set_title("Proporsi Kelas")

plt.tight_layout()
plt.savefig("01_distribusi_kelas.png", dpi=150, bbox_inches="tight")
plt.show()

7. Statistik Panjang Teks (Word Count)¶

In [60]:
stats = []
for lbl in ['diabetes', 'tbc']:
    wc = df[df["keyword"] == lbl]["word_count"]
    stats.append({
        "keyword":   lbl,
        "n":       len(wc),
        "min":     wc.min(),
        "Q1":      wc.quantile(0.25),
        "median":  wc.median(),
        "mean":    round(wc.mean(), 1),
        "Q3":      wc.quantile(0.75),
        "max":     wc.max(),
        "std":     round(wc.std(), 1),
    })
pd.DataFrame(stats).set_index('keyword')
Out[60]:
n min Q1 median mean Q3 max std

In [63]:
fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(6,5))

data_box = [df[df['keyword'] == lbl]['word_count'].values for lbl in ['diabetes', 'tbc']]

bp = ax.boxplot(
    data_box,
    patch_artist=True,
    labels=['Diabetes', 'TBC'],
    medianprops={'color': 'black', 'linewidth': 2}
)

for patch, color in zip(bp['boxes'], PALETTE):
    patch.set_facecolor(color)
    patch.set_alpha(0.75)

ax.set_title("Box Plot per Kelas")
ax.set_ylabel("Jumlah Kata")

plt.tight_layout()
plt.savefig("02_distribusi_word_count.png", dpi=150, bbox_inches="tight")
plt.show()

8. Distribusi Fitur Statistik Teks¶

In [37]:
features = {
    "Panjang Karakter (char_count)": "char_count",
    "Jumlah Kata (word_count)":      "word_count",
    "Rata-rata Panjang Kata":        "avg_word_len",
    "Jumlah Kalimat (sent_count)":   "sent_count",
}

fig, axes = plt.subplots(2, 2, figsize=(13, 8))
fig.suptitle('Fitur Statistik Teks per Kelas', fontsize=14, fontweight='bold')

for ax, (title, col) in zip(axes.flat, features.items()):
    for lbl, color in zip(['diabetes', 'tbc'], PALETTE):
        sub = df[df["keyword"] == lbl][col]
        sub_c = sub.clip(upper=sub.quantile(0.99))
        ax.hist(sub_c, bins=40, alpha=0.6, label=lbl.title(),
                color=color, edgecolor='white', density=True)
    ax.set_title(title)
    ax.set_ylabel('Densitas')
    ax.legend(fontsize=9)

plt.tight_layout()
plt.savefig("04_fitur_teks.png", dpi=150, bbox_inches="tight")
plt.show()
In [39]:
STOPWORDS_ID = {
    "yang","di","dan","ini","itu","dengan","untuk","dari","ke","dalam","pada",
    "tidak","juga","akan","atau","oleh","ada","telah","dapat","adalah","sebagai",
    "lebih","sudah","ia","mereka","saat","sehingga","namun","jika","agar","karena",
    "harus","pun","bisa","masih","bila","setelah","maka","tersebut","bahwa","kita",
    "tahun","kata","ujar","menjadi","melakukan","memiliki","secara","para","kami",
    "saya","persen","hingga","sangat","antara","bagi","merupakan","seperti","maupun",
    "tentang","hal","atas","kepada","serta","lain","nya","tetapi","ketika",
    "scroll","continue","with","content","gambas","video","detik","tonton",
    "foto","lihat","baca","artikel","berita","detikcom","kompas","tribun","cnbc",
}

def clean_text(text: str) -> list:
    """Lowercase -> hapus URL & non-alpha -> tokenisasi -> hapus stopword."""
    text = text.lower()
    text = re.sub(r"https?://\S+", " ", text)
    text = re.sub(r"[^a-z\s]", " ", text)
    return [w for w in text.split() if len(w) >= 4 and w not in STOPWORDS_ID]

9. Top 15 Kata per Kelas (Setelah Stopword Removal)¶

In [42]:
N_TOP = 15
df["combined"] = df["title"] + " " + df["content"]

fig, axes = plt.subplots(1, 2, figsize=(14, 6))
fig.suptitle(f'Top {N_TOP} Kata per Kelas (setelah stopword removal)',
             fontsize=14, fontweight='bold')

for ax, (lbl, color) in zip(axes, zip(['diabetes', 'tbc'], PALETTE)):
    text   = " ".join(df[df["keyword"] == lbl]["combined"].tolist())
    tokens = clean_text(text)
    top    = Counter(tokens).most_common(N_TOP)
    words, counts = zip(*top)

    bars = ax.barh([w[:22] for w in words[::-1]], counts[::-1],
                   color=color, alpha=0.85, edgecolor='white')
    ax.set_title(lbl.title(), fontsize=13, fontweight='bold', color=color)
    ax.set_xlabel('Frekuensi')
    for bar, val in zip(bars, counts[::-1]):
        ax.text(bar.get_width() + 20, bar.get_y() + bar.get_height()/2,
                f"{val:,}", va="center", fontsize=9)
    ax.set_xlim(0, max(counts) * 1.15)

plt.tight_layout()
plt.savefig("05_top_kata.png", dpi=150, bbox_inches="tight")
plt.show()

10. Word Cloud per Kelas (Setelah Stopword Removal)¶

In [44]:
fig, axes = plt.subplots(1, 2, figsize=(14, 5))
fig.suptitle('Word Cloud per Kelas', fontsize=14, fontweight='bold')

for ax, (lbl, color, cmap) in zip(axes, [
    ('diabetes', COLOR_DIABETES, 'Blues'),
    ('tbc',      COLOR_TBC,      'Oranges'),
]):
    text   = " ".join(df[df["keyword"] == lbl]["combined"].tolist())
    tokens = clean_text(text)
    freq   = Counter(tokens)

    wc = WordCloud(
        width=700, height=380,
        background_color='white',
        colormap=cmap,
        max_words=100,
        prefer_horizontal=0.85,
        collocations=False,
    ).generate_from_frequencies(freq)

    ax.imshow(wc, interpolation='bilinear')
    ax.axis('off')
    ax.set_title(lbl.title(), fontsize=13, fontweight='bold', color=color, pad=10)

plt.tight_layout()
plt.savefig("06_wordcloud.png", dpi=150, bbox_inches="tight")
plt.show()

11. Word Cloud per Kelas (Sebelum Stopword Removal)¶

In [22]:
from wordcloud import WordCloud
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt

tbc_text = " ".join(df[df['keyword']=="tbc"]['content'].fillna("").astype(str))
diabetes_text = " ".join(df[df['keyword']=="diabetes"]['content'].fillna("").astype(str))

wc_tbc = WordCloud().generate(tbc_text)
wc_diabetes = WordCloud().generate(diabetes_text)

plt.figure(figsize=(12,5))

# TBC
plt.subplot(1,2,1)
plt.imshow(wc_tbc)
plt.title("WordCloud TBC")
plt.axis("off")

# Diabetes
plt.subplot(1,2,2)
plt.imshow(wc_diabetes)
plt.title("WordCloud Diabetes")
plt.axis("off")

plt.show()
